title: IC10 Environment Config
description: Multi-device simulation environment for the IC10 JetBrains plugin (.ic10env). Accepts YAML or JSON.

devices.description: Devices in the simulation. At least one is required.

networks.description: Network topology. If omitted, all devices are placed on a single shared data network.

device.description: A single device in the simulation environment.

id.description: Unique numeric ID for this device. IDs are auto-assigned starting from 1 if omitted; explicit IDs are never overwritten.

name.description: Optional display name shown in the debugger panel.

source.description: Path to an .ic10 source file, relative to this config file. Mutually exclusive with 'prefab'. The device is created as a StructureCircuitHousing.

prefab.description: Stationpedia prefab name of a non-IC10 device (e.g. StructureMemory, StructureAutolathe). Mutually exclusive with 'source'.

class.description: Device behaviour class. Only meaningful when 'prefab' is set. 'crafter' selects StructureCrafter (Autolathe, PipeBender, etc.); omit for passive devices.

properties.description: Initial logic property values, keyed by logic-type name (e.g. Setting, On, Pressure). Applied after the device is initialised.

network.description: A named network connecting a set of devices.

id.description: Network ID. Referenced for routing; must be unique across networks.

dataConnected.description: Device IDs on this data network. IC10 instructions can read/write any device on the same data network.

softConnected.description: Device IDs reachable via cable only (power / channel access). IC10 cannot directly address these by slot.
